message:
fix(share): include HTML files in SRI computation

The viewer SRI map was missing .html files, which should also have
integrity hashes computed for security when serving static assets.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1811,7 +1811,7 @@ def _build_viewer_sri(bundle_root: Path) -> dict[str, str]:
     for path in viewer_root.rglob("*"):
         if not path.is_file():
             continue
-        if path.suffix not in {".js", ".css", ".wasm"}:
+        if path.suffix not in {".js", ".css", ".wasm", ".html"}:
             continue
         relative = path.relative_to(bundle_root).as_posix()
         sri_map[relative] = _compute_sri(path)
